creator: bernard.delahaye@groupe-mma.fr
text:
the network card was ok with 4.3-release and 4.4prerelease
cvsup, makewold, make kernel...: messages in dmesg
pccard: card inserted, slot 0
xe0 at port 0x240-0x24f iomem 0xcc000-0xccfff irq 13 slot 0 on pccard0
pcic0: Hardware does not support irq 13
device_probe_and_attach: xe0 attach returned 22

Kernconf is Generic (same pb with MYKERNEL ok in 4.4prerelease)
tried different modifications ni pccard.conf without results
the card is ok with W2000 (irq 7)

How-To-Repeat: cvsup with a xircom ethernet card ?
